themes.label: Fear/Anxiety

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And Saul said unto him, Why have ye conspired against me, thou and the son of Jesse, in that...". Word-study detail reinforces "לֶ֣חֶם: him bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)".
